title: Senior School Sponsorship Programme
tagline: Sponsoring school fees for needy students across Kisumu County — covering the full 3 years of senior school.
intro_p1: Secondary school education is a turning point in a young person's life — but for many families in Kisumu County, the cost of school fees is simply out of reach. Without support, talented and hardworking students are forced to drop out, closing the door on their future before it has even opened.
intro_p2: UCDP's Senior School Sponsorship Programme focuses specifically on school fee sponsorship. Needy students within the community and across Kisumu County are assessed, and those successfully selected receive their full school fees paid throughout their time in senior (secondary) school.
intro_p3: The selection process is thorough and fair — prioritising genuine financial need alongside the student's commitment to their education. Once enrolled in the programme, sponsored students are supported until they complete their secondary schooling.

quick_facts.label: Selection
quick_facts.value: Based on financial need & financial need

steps.title: Application & Assessment
steps.text: Needy students from the community and across Kisumu County are identified and assessed for financial need and commitment to education.

steps.title: Selection
steps.text: Successful candidates are selected through a fair and transparent process and officially enrolled in the sponsorship programme.

steps.title: Fee Payment
steps.text: School fees are paid directly on behalf of each sponsored student, covering their full time in senior school.

steps.title: Ongoing Support
steps.text: Students remain in the programme and continue receiving fee sponsorship until they complete their secondary education.
